use_cases: Hero section background with interactive cursor-tracked glitch effects for tech and gaming brands
Landing page visual enhancement for developer tools and SaaS products seeking a cyberpunk aesthetic
Portfolio or creative agency website feature to showcase technical sophistication and attention to detail
Interactive marketing microsites requiring engaging cursor-based visual feedback
Gaming or entertainment platform branding elements with glitch and scanline visual effects
ai_summary: A canvas-based interactive cursor effect featuring glitch blocks and scanlines that follow the mouse position. When users click, the visual effect intensifies with randomized color shifts in cyan and magenta hues. The component renders continuous animation with fading glitch artifacts and horizontal scanline displacement, creating a corrupted digital space aesthetic ideal for tech-forward landing pages, creative portfolios, and gaming-related interfaces.
